Name: UPawnSensingComponent
Description:
SensingComponent encapsulates sensory (ie sight and hearing) settings and functionality for an Actor,
  allowing the actor to seehear Pawns in the world. It does nothing on network clients.

Variables.Name: HearingThreshold
Variables.Description: Max distance at which a makenoise(1.0) loudness sound can be heard, regardless of occlusion

Variables.Name: LOSHearingThreshold
Variables.Description: Max distance at which a makenoise(1.0) loudness sound can be heard if unoccluded (LOSHearingThreshold should be > HearingThreshold)

Variables.Name: SensingInterval
Variables.Description: Amount of time between pawn sensing updates. Use SetSensingInterval() to adjust this at runtime. A value <= 0 prevents any updates.

Variables.Name: bEnableSensingUpdates
Variables.Description: If true, component will perform sensing updates. At runtime change this using SetSensingUpdatesEnabled().

Variables.Name: bOnlySensePlayers
Variables.Description: If true, will only sense player-controlled pawns in the world. Default: true

Variables.Name: bSeePawns
Variables.Description: If true, we will perform visibility tests and will trigger notifications when a Pawn is visible. Default: true

Variables.Name: bHearNoises
Variables.Description:
If true, we will perform audibility tests and will be notified when a Pawn makes a noise that can be heard. Default: true
	  IMPORTANT NOTE: If we can see pawns (bSeePawns is true), and the pawn is visible, noise notifications are not triggered.

Variables.Name: PeripheralVisionAngle
Variables.Description: How far to the side AI can see, in degrees. Use SetPeripheralVisionAngle to change the value at runtime.

Variables.Name: PeripheralVisionCosine
Variables.Description: Cosine of limits of peripheral vision. Computed from PeripheralVisionAngle.

Functions.Name: SetSensingInterval
Functions.Description:
Changes the SensingInterval.
	  If we are currently waiting for an interval, this can either extend or shorten that interval.
	  A value <= 0 prevents any updates.

Functions.Name: SetSensingUpdatesEnabled
Functions.Description: Enables or disables sensing updates. The timer is reset in either case.

Functions.Name: SetPeripheralVisionAngle
Functions.Description: Sets PeripheralVisionAngle. Calculates PeripheralVisionCosine from PeripheralVisionAngle

Delegate.Name: OnSeePawn
Delegate.Description: Delegate to execute when we see a Pawn.

Delegate.Name: OnHearNoise
Delegate.Description: Delegate to execute when we hear a noise from a Pawn's PawnNoiseEmitterComponent.
